title: Spark Translations
description: Defines the UI translation strings for a MintPlayer Spark application. Each key maps to a TranslatedString with translations per language code. Place this file at App_Data/translations.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

TranslatedString.description: A translated string where keys are ISO language codes (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'nl') and values are the translated text.
